message:
test(decision): add property tests for Wonham filter and Gittins index

Add 11 proptest-based property tests covering:
- Wonham filter: probability conservation, non-negativity, filter-step
- GeneratorMatrix: row-sum invariant, Euler validity, matrix-exp validity
- Gittins index: no-panic/finite values, decomposition sum, determinism,
  ordering, non-negative continuation

Each test runs 2000 random cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
